'''ât-zh-g''' ('''katazhag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:forecall|forecall]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-zh-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:forecall|forecall]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-zh-g
|-
! Lemma
| katazhag
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitazhag|thitazhag]] || [[word:jitazhag|jitazhag]] || [[word:shitazhag|shitazhag]] || [[word:kitazhag|kitazhag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutazhag|thuthutazhag]] || [[word:jujutazhag|jujutazhag]] || [[word:shushutazhag|shushutazhag]] || [[word:kukutazhag|kukutazhag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutazhag|thutazhag]] || [[word:jutazhag|jutazhag]] || [[word:shutazhag|shutazhag]] || [[word:kutazhag|kutazhag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutazhag|thutazhag]] || [[word:jutazhag|jutazhag]] || [[word:shutazhag|shutazhag]] || [[word:kutazhag|kutazhag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetazhag|thetazhag]] || [[word:jetazhag|jetazhag]] || [[word:shetazhag|shetazhag]] || [[word:ketazhag|ketazhag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotazhag|thothotazhag]] || [[word:jojotazhag|jojotazhag]] || [[word:shoshotazhag|shoshotazhag]] || [[word:kokotazhag|kokotazhag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotazhag|thotazhag]] || [[word:jotazhag|jotazhag]] || [[word:shotazhag|shotazhag]] || [[word:kotazhag|kotazhag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotazhag|thotazhag]] || [[word:jotazhag|jotazhag]] || [[word:shotazhag|shotazhag]] || [[word:kotazhag|kotazhag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtazhag|thĂŠtazhag]] || [[word:jĂŠtazhag|jĂŠtazhag]] || [[word:shĂŠtazhag|shĂŠtazhag]] || [[word:kĂŠtazhag|kĂŠtazhag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatazhag|thathatazhag]] || [[word:jajatazhag|jajatazhag]] || [[word:shashatazhag|shashatazhag]] || [[word:kakatazhag|kakatazhag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatazhag|thatazhag]] || [[word:jatazhag|jatazhag]] || [[word:shatazhag|shatazhag]] || [[word:katazhag|katazhag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatazhag|thatazhag]] || [[word:jatazhag|jatazhag]] || [[word:shatazhag|shatazhag]] || [[word:katazhag|katazhag]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shatazhag|shatazhag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshatazhag|goshatazhag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishatazhag|gokishatazhag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shatazhagnĂŒ|shatazhagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshatazhagnknĂŒ|goshatazhagnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishatazhagnĂŒ|gokishatazhagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatazhagshĂ«|shatazhagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatazhagnkshĂ«|goshatazhagnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatazhagshĂ«|gokishatazhagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatazhagro|shatazhagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatazhagnkro|goshatazhagnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatazhagro|gokishatazhagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shatazhagmu|shatazhagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatazhagnkmu|goshatazhagnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatazhagmu|gokishatazhagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shatazhagsher|shatazhagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshatazhagnksher|goshatazhagnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishatazhagsher|gokishatazhagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shatazhagng|shatazhagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshatazhagnkng|goshatazhagnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishatazhagng|gokishatazhagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shatazhagya|shatazhagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshatazhagnkya|goshatazhagnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishatazhagya|gokishatazhagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shatazhagyam|shatazhagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshatazhagnkyam|goshatazhagnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishatazhagyam|gokishatazhagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatazhagnĂŒshĂ«|shatazhagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatazhagnknĂŒshĂ«|goshatazhagnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatazhagnĂŒshĂ«|gokishatazhagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatazhagnĂŒro|shatazhagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatazhagnknĂŒro|goshatazhagnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatazhagnĂŒro|gokishatazhagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatazhagnĂŒmu|shatazhagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatazhagnknĂŒmu|goshatazhagnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatazhagnĂŒmu|gokishatazhagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatazhagshĂ«nĂŒ|shatazhagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatazhagnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshatazhagnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatazhagshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishatazhagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatazhagshĂ«ro|shatazhagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatazhagnkshĂ«ro|goshatazhagnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatazhagshĂ«ro|gokishatazhagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatazhagshĂ«mu|shatazhagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatazhagnkshĂ«mu|goshatazhagnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatazhagshĂ«mu|gokishatazhagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatazhagronĂŒ|shatazhagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatazhagnkronĂŒ|goshatazhagnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatazhagronĂŒ|gokishatazhagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatazhagroshĂ«|shatazhagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatazhagnkroshĂ«|goshatazhagnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatazhagroshĂ«|gokishatazhagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatazhagromu|shatazhagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatazhagnkromu|goshatazhagnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatazhagromu|gokishatazhagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatazhagmunĂŒ|shatazhagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatazhagnkmunĂŒ|goshatazhagnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatazhagmunĂŒ|gokishatazhagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatazhagmushĂ«|shatazhagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatazhagnkmushĂ«|goshatazhagnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatazhagmushĂ«|gokishatazhagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatazhagmuro|shatazhagmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatazhagnkmuro|goshatazhagnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatazhagmuro|gokishatazhagmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
